title: chaetopappa asteroides var. asteroides
intro: Chaetopappa asteroides var. asteroides, also known as the mountain top aster, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and sore throats, due to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Chaetopappa asteroides var. asteroides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and steeping the plant's leaves and flowers.
